title: Fix password gate routing, remove Trailer header, reorder press kit sections

requirements.text: Move the password gate so it blocks access to the press kit from the landing page. When password protection is enabled, the PasswordGateModal must be shown on the landing page (the '/' route) before the user can navigate to the press kit ('/press-kit'). The press kit page content must not be visible while the password dialog is open. Only after successful password verification (sessionStorage flag set) should the user be allowed to view the press kit.

quotes: Please make sure when password dialog is open to show it on the landing page still, because now it is opened on the press kit and you see the content.

acceptanceCriteria: When password protection is enabled, visiting '/' shows the PasswordGateModal on the landing page
The press kit page content is not visible while the password dialog is open
After entering the correct password, the user can access '/press-kit' and the modal does not reappear
The sessionStorage verification flag is set on successful password entry
If the user navigates directly to '/press-kit' without the sessionStorage flag set, they are redirected to the landing page where the password gate is shown

requirements.text: Remove the 'Trailer' header/label text from the press kit page video section. The VideoSection component or its parent in PressKitPage must no longer render any heading or label text that says 'Trailer'. Only the video thumbnail and player should remain.
acceptanceCriteria: No text reading 'Trailer' (or any section heading for the video block) is visible on the press kit page
The video thumbnail and YouTube player still render and function correctly
No other content is removed or altered

requirements.text: Reorder the sections displayed on the PressKitPage to match the following vertical sequence: 1. Game logo, 2. YouTube video, 3. About, 4. Game Details, 5. Features, 6. Screenshots, 7. Download all screenshots button, 8. Socials, 9. Press email. Do not add, remove, or alter any content within each section — only the order of sections changes.

quotes: For the presskit content only change the order of the content

Display content in press kit
1. Game logo
2. Youtube video
3. About
4. Game Details
5. Features
6. Screenshots 
7. Download all screenshots
8. Socials
9. Press email

acceptanceCriteria: The press kit page renders sections in exactly this order: Game logo → YouTube video → About → Game Details → Features → Screenshots → Download all screenshots → Socials → Press email
All section content remains unchanged — only their vertical order is modified
No sections are removed or duplicated
The single shared max-width container and alignment of all sections is preserved

constraints: Do not modify any text content within press kit sections — only their order changes
Do not alter the VideoSection component's thumbnail or player functionality
Do not change backend logic or data models
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve existing layout, alignment, and styling of all press kit sections
nonGoals: Changing any CMS content or backend data
Adding new sections or removing existing ones from the press kit
Changing the password verification logic itself — only where and when the modal is shown
